title: Nifty 50, Sensex Outlook: How Will Indian Stock Market Trade On July 21?
description: The Indian stock market benchmark bourses, Sensex, and Nifty 50, are expected to open slightly lower even when there are positive cues from Asian markets, which rose in early trade as artificial-intelligence led sell-off lost steam.
content:
Shares of Alpine Texworld will be listed on the bourses. The issue price has been set at Rs 105 per share. The company's public issue closed Thursday, with bids placed for 16.88 million shares against 12 million shares on offer.

title: AI-guided technique improves targeted therapy delivery for brain tumors
description: Researchers presented a groundbreaking artificial intelligence (AI)-guided technique today at the Society of NeuroInterventional Surgery's (SNIS) 23rd Annual Meeting that may improve the accuracy of delivering experimental therapies directly to malignant brain tumors.

title: Who is Indian-origin MP Kanishka Narayan? UK's first AI minister appointed by new Prime Minister Andy Burnham
description: UK Prime Minister Andy Burnham has appointed Kanishka Narayan as minister for artificial intelligence, making the role cabinet-level for the first time. Here's all you need to know about him.
content:
UK Prime Minister Andy Burnham, on Monday (local time), named Kanishka Narayan as minister for artificial intelligence (AI), making the position a cabinet-level role for the first time.

title: Google is building an AI fence around the Internet it once championed
description: Google's move last year to revamp its search with artificial intelligence is having increasingly far-reaching affects.
content:
Now in the age of artificial intelligence, Google appears to be shrinking back from the open web -- and may be imperiling it.

title: New YouTube guidelines are looking to end AI slop and clickbait traps
description: In a decisive move to protect viewer feeds and advertiser dollars, YouTube has updated its monetization guidelines to strip cash flow from low-quality, AI-generated material. The streaming giant is refining the rules governing its lucrative YouTube Partner Program (YPP) to specifically target “inauthentic content” designed solely for low-effort content farming. Rather than banning artificial intelligence […]

title: US$1.5B settlement of copyright lawsuit is approved

title: Commentary: The AI Revolution Must Go Green to Survive
description: Commentary: The AI Revolution Must Go Green to Survive - Developing artificial intelligence isn’t the ultimate goal, but ensuring sustainable human development is
